variants.title: HiFi Filter KD 70504 Urea Filter Kit | Replaces the SF Filter SAB 559
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter KD 70504 Urea Filter Kit | Replaces the SF Filter SAB 559
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter KD 70504 Urea Filter Kit is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAB 559. Easy to install and replace, the KD 70504 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: UREA FILTER KIT, Dimension 1 (D1): 94.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 64.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 51.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 16.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 10.0 mm
